series_metadata.series_description: Case files containing all papers (e.g. hearing request, pleadings, briefs, transcripts, Hearing Examiner Report and Recommendation) submitted in connection with adjudicatory proceedings before the Ohio EPA.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in operating area case is closed and all appeals are concluded or appeal periods have expired. off-site storage facility and five years. Contact State Archives determine whether records are of historical value. If so, State Archives. If not
